response.overview: Feel the Burn follows rival spies LaShay and Vivian, two elite operatives who are forced to reunite for a mission that tests their skill, loyalty, and hearts. Their target is Rudy, a charismatic operative with a shadowed past, with whom each has shared secretive missions under different identities across the globe.
response.tagline: Three Spies. Two Relationships. One True Love.
response.title: Feel The Burn
